query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] Briefing complete. Key patterns confirmed: sidecar backward-compat (#3585), zero `ScenarioResult` changes (#3587), `render.rs` 499-line limit (#3583), dual-type constraint (#3574).

**Wave plan (for Stage 3b, after Gate 3a):**
- Wave 1: Profile Types + Profile Validation + module pre-splits (parallel, all foundational)
- Wave 2: Runner Profile Meta Sidecar + Distribution Gate Aggregation (parallel, depend on Wave 1 types)
- Wave 3: Distribution Gate Renderer + Section 5 Dispatch + Report Sidecar Load (parallel, depend on Wave 2)
- Wave 4: Tests + Documentation (parallel, depend on Wave 3)

Spawning Stage 3a now.
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: Gate 3b: implementation wave delivers production code but zero mandatory tests — entire test modules absent
Roadmap milestones 5-6: Orchestration and Real-Time Interface
ADR-008: Wave Ordering and Cross-Crate Synchronization
Wave structure for multi-component features: parallel independent components first, sequential dependents second
Two-wave delivery for compile-dependent components: Wave 1 independent interfaces, Wave 2 consuming implementations
